sentences.blanked: The data reveal a strong correlation between carbon emissions and ________.

sentences.en: Recent studies have demonstrated the significant impact of life on the ecosystem.
sentences.tr: Son çalışmalar, ekipman yapısının ekosistem üzerindeki önemli etkisini göstermiştir.
sentences.blanked: Recent studies have demonstrated the significant impact of ________ on the ecosystem.

sentences.en: Researchers must carefully monitor the changes in life during the experiment.
sentences.tr: Araştırmacılar, deney sırasında ekipman durumundaki değişimleri dikkatle gözlemlemelidir.
sentences.blanked: Researchers must carefully monitor the changes in ________ during the experiment.

sentences.en: A key factor in achieving sustainable development is controlling the level of life.
sentences.tr: Sürdürülebilir kalkınmayı sağlamada temel faktör, ekipman seviyesinin kontrol edilmesidir.
sentences.blanked: A key factor in achieving sustainable development is controlling the level of ________.

sentences.en: The primary objective of this project is to analyze the behavior of life under pressure.
sentences.tr: Bu projenin temel amacı, basınç altında ekipman davranışını analiz etmektir.
sentences.blanked: The primary objective of this project is to analyze the behavior of ________ under pressure.
